error.auth: ⚠️ Authentication error: {msg}. Please check your API key in Settings.
error.forbidden: ⚠️ Access denied: {msg}. Please check your API key.
error.rate_limit: ⚠️ Rate limit exceeded: {msg}. Please wait and try again.
error.quota_exhausted: ⚠️ Quota exhausted: {msg}. Please check your account.
error.timeout: ⚠️ Request timed out: {msg}. Please try again.
error.connection_refused: ⚠️ Cannot connect to server: {msg}. Please check your network connection.
error.text_too_long: ⚠️ Text too long: {msg}. Please shorten your question or select fewer documents.
error.model_not_found: ⚠️ Model not found: {msg}. Please check the model name in Settings.
error.server_error: ⚠️ Server error: {msg}. Please try again later.
error.llama_not_found: ⚠️ Cannot connect to llama-server. Please ensure llama-server.exe is running and the URL is correct in Settings.
error.gpu_oom: ⚠️ GPU out of memory: {msg}. Please reduce context size or try again.
error.free_quota: ⚠️ Daily free quota exceeded. Please come back tomorrow or configure your own API key.
error.backend_starting: ⏳ Backend is starting. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
error.search_not_ready: ⚠️ Search engine is not ready. Please import at least one paper first.
error.ai_not_ready: ⚠️ AI engine is not ready. Please check LLM configuration in Settings.
error.bm25_not_ready: BM25 search is not ready yet.
error.github_token_invalid: GitHub Token is invalid. Get a PAT at https://github.com/settings/tokens
error.cf_token_invalid: API Token is invalid or Account ID is wrong.
error.cf_model_not_found: Model not found. Check the model name and Account ID.
settings.no_gemini_key: No Gemini API Key configured. Go to Custom API Key section to enter one.
settings.data_dir_same: New directory is the same as current directory.
settings.reset_done: Application reset to initial state successfully.
settings.zotero_not_found: Zotero data directory not found. Please enter manually.
settings.daily_limit_reached: You have used all {limit} free questions today. Please switch to your own API Key or Local mode.
chat.empty_collection: This collection has no documents to chat with.
chat.all_free_failed: ⚠️ All cloud_free providers failed. Switching to Local model...
chat.all_providers_failed: ⚠️ No provider is working. Switching to Local model...
insights.insufficient_data: Insufficient data for analysis. Please import more papers into your library.
insights.select_min_two: Please select at least 2 documents for comparison.
review.select_min_two: Please select at least 2 documents for comparison.
review.export_empty: Review content is empty, cannot export.
review.docx_not_installed: python-docx is not installed. Run: pip install python-docx
review.description_hint: Describe the specific problem in English
import.bib_only: Only .bib files supported. Please select a BibTeX file from Zotero.
import.bib_read_fail: Cannot read file. Please check UTF-8 encoding.
import.bib_no_entries: No entries found in BibTeX file. Please check the file.
import.csv_only: Only .csv files supported. Please export from Zotero as CSV.
import.csv_read_fail: Cannot read CSV file. Please check UTF-8 encoding.
import.csv_no_data: No data found in CSV file. Please check the export format from Zotero.
import.pdf_not_found: PDF file not found in Zotero storage
import.zotero_not_configured: Zotero directory not configured. Please set the Zotero data path in Settings.
import.pdf_retry_scanned: Could not extract enough text. The document may be a scanned PDF that needs OCR.
import.chunk_fail: Could not create chunks from document.
import.zotero_csv_only: Only .csv files supported. Please export from Zotero as CSV.
graph.already_building: Graph is being built — please wait or click Stop.
personal.daily_prompt: You are a personal research assistant. Suggest 2-3 papers to read today.
personal.start_desc: Import your first PDF to build your research library.
personal.unread_papers_desc: You have {count} papers waiting. Start with the most important one.
personal.top_topic_desc: You're focusing on '{topic}'. Find more related papers to expand your knowledge.
personal.multi_lang_desc: Your library has multiple languages: {langs}. This shows diverse research sources.
personal.starred_desc: Starred papers: {titles}. These may be your main research direction.
personal.review_desc: With many unread papers, let AI summarize and review for you.
verify.paper_not_found: ⚠️ Paper not found: {label}. Please select again from your library.
verify.paper_indexing: ⚠️ Paper **{filename}** is being indexed. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
verify.paper_scanned: ⚠️ Paper **{filename}** appears to be a scanned PDF and needs OCR before using AI.
verify.paper_not_indexed: ⚠️ Paper **{filename}** has not been indexed. Please re-import.
papers.highlights_not_ready: Paper has not been fully indexed for highlights.
papers.summary_not_ready: AI is not ready to generate summary. Please wait for backend to finish starting up.
papers.summary_no_chunks: This paper has no data to generate summary. Please re-import.
papers.summary_generation_failed: AI failed to generate summary for this paper. Please try again.
search.filter_syntax: Hybrid search across all indexed PDFs with support for tag: filters.
export.docx_not_installed: python-docx is not installed. Run: pip install python-docx
export.fpdf_not_installed: fpdf2 is not installed. Run: pip install fpdf2
